generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
network: Network error. Check your connection and retry.
unauthorized: You need to sign in to do that.
forbidden: You do not have permission to do that.
not_found: We could not find what you were looking for.
server: Our servers are having a problem. Please try again shortly.
validation: Please correct the errors and try again.

codes.email_already_exists: An account with this email already exists.
codes.password_too_similar: Password is too similar to your personal information.
codes.refresh_token_missing: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
codes.refresh_token_invalid: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
codes.internal_code_conflict: Another item already uses this internal code.
codes.attribute_key_invalid: Key must start with a lowercase letter and use only a-z, 0-9, and underscores.
codes.attribute_key_conflict: Another field already uses this key.
codes.attribute_options_invalid: Options must be non-empty and unique for select fields.
codes.ai_draft_oversize: The AI couldn't fit the formulation in the chosen dosage form. Simplify the brief or pick a larger capsule / tablet size.
codes.formulation_has_dependencies: This project still has trial batches attached. Delete the batches (and any linked QC validations) first, then try again.
